title: Remove repo-local bootstrap from watchtower_core
summary: Delete repo-local path bootstrapping from watchtower_core and rely on the installed watchtower_plan package boundary instead.
scope_items: Remove repo-local sys.path bootstrapping from watchtower_core runtime surfaces.
Keep CLI, closeout, and validation behavior working against the installed watchtower_plan package.
Leave reusable core fail-closed and pack-agnostic.
done_when_items: watchtower_core no longer contains a repo-local import shim for plan/python.
All runtime imports resolve through the installed plan-owned package boundary.
